inputs.label: Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which mass is expelled from the propulsion system.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate at which mass is expelled from the propulsion system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik sisteminden atılan kütle akış hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Rate, mit der Masse aus dem Antriebssystem ausgestoßen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le débit massique éjecté du système de propulsion.

inputs.label: Exhaust Velocity
inputs.businessContext: The velocity of the exhaust gases relative to the engine.

businessContext_i18n.en: The velocity of the exhaust gases relative to the engine.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Geschwindigkeit der Abgase relativ zum Triebwerk.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La vitesse des gaz d'échappement par rapport au moteur.

inputs.label: Exit Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The static pressure at the nozzle exit plane.

businessContext_i18n.en: The static pressure at the nozzle exit plane.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der statische Druck an der Düsenaustrittsebene.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La pression statique au plan de sortie de la tuyère.

inputs.label: Ambient Pressure
inputs.businessContext: The pressure of the surrounding environment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The pressure of the surrounding environment.

inputs.label: Exit Area
inputs.businessContext: The cross-sectional area of the nozzle exit.

businessContext_i18n.en: The cross-sectional area of the nozzle exit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La section transversale de la sortie de la buse.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
